Olecranon fracture malunion treated surgically: A case report highlighting one elbow, four orthopedic surgeons, and two physical therapists

MJ Kolber, WJ Hanney - Physiotherapy Theory and Practice, 2026
Background Displaced olecranon fractures often require surgical fixation. A mobility
loss following surgery may occur from fibrosis due to immobilization, malunion, and
associated diagnoses. This case highlights the diagnostic uncertainty that may arise …

 

This message was sent by Google Scholar because you're following new articles written by William J. Hanney.
